purpose: Route ambiguous finance requests to the narrowest child across audit-control support and finance-data tooling.
selection_order: Audit-control support beats finance-data tooling when the user is doing SOX, internal controls, or workpaper work.
Default to finance-data tooling when the request is about finance connectors, market data, or public-company retrieval patterns.

children.name: finance-audit-support
children.summary: Supports SOX 404 and internal-control audit work around scoping, sample selection, testing evidence, workpapers, and deficiency evaluation.
route_when: The request is about SOX 404, internal controls, sample selection, workpapers, deficiency assessment, remediation, or control testing.
The main output is audit-support logic or documentation rather than market-data retrieval.
avoid_when: The user is asking for stock, company, or connector data rather than audit work.
The request is primarily about how to retrieve finance data from tools.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover finance children automatically.

children.name: finance-markets
children.summary: Defines finance connector discovery, reference-date handling, and structured market-data retrieval patterns for public-company and market analysis work.
route_when: The request is about finance connectors, quotes, financials, earnings, estimates, segments, or other structured market-data retrieval patterns.
The child is needed as a finance-data dependency for investment or other market-analysis workflows.
avoid_when: The main request is audit controls, workpapers, or SOX support.
The request is not about finance data or finance-tool usage at all.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover finance children automatically.
